nasb.text: He has put forth his hands against those who were at peace with him; He has violated his covenant.

esv.text: My companion  stretched out his hand against his friends; he violated his covenant.

cnv.text: 他違背了自己的約， 伸手攻擊那些與他和好的人。

ccb.text: 我的同伴违背盟约，攻击朋友。

csbs.text: 我的同伴出手对付自己的朋友， 他亵渎了自己的约。
